mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL indicates accelerating inflation, which forces markets to price in tighter monetary policy, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 over 3-year rolling windows, or positive 20d returns occur in >65% of rising CPI periods.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE exceeds 5.0%, labor market slack triggers recession fears that outweigh growth optimism, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in >60% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 5.0%, or signal loses predictive power in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in RSAFS and HOUST signal a broad-based demand contraction across financial and housing sectors, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint decline in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict negative returns with statistical significance (p > 0.05) in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of rising FEDFUNDS, an increase in INDPRO reflects robust industrial output that absorbs monetary tightening, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 5d returns do not significantly outperform baseline during tightening phases, or INDPRO growth fails to offset rate hike impacts in regression analysis.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in PAYEMS reflects expanding employment that supports consumer spending and corporate revenues, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows, or PAYEMS growth shows no significant correlation with 20d forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 quarterly growth falls below 1.5%, weak economic expansion triggers risk-off positioning, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX yields positive 60d returns in >60% of low-GDP growth quarters, or the threshold fails to separate return distributions significantly.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising CPIAUCSL and falling FEDFUNDS indicates policy lag where inflation outpaces rate adjustments, creating uncertainty that suppresses S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The divergence between rising inflation and falling rates does not predict negative returns with p < 0.05 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: In a low-rate environment, rising HOUST signals housing market strength that boosts construction and consumer confidence, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Housing starts fail to predict positive 5d returns when rates are below 3.0%, or the signal reverses direction in walk-forward validation.
